description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 8th; Slot belt; Price 10,000 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION An engraving of a charging rhinoceros decorates this thick leather belt. The belt grants its wearer a +2 enhancement bonus to Strength. Treat this as a temporary ability bonus for the first 24 hours the belt is worn. The belt magnifies the wearerâs momentum whenever she charges, granting her a +2 bonus on bull rush and overrun maneuvers. Furthermore, when the wearer makes a charge attack, her melee weapons and natural weapons deal damage as if they were one size category larger than they actually are. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, bullâs strength, lead blades; Cost 5,000 gp.
